pages.text: Ancient Scrolls are powerful one-time consumables that provide dramatic effects. They replace the old combat circles.$(br2)Examples:$(br)- Solar Judgement: massive holy AOE$(br)- Chronal Stillness: time stop$(br)- Thousand-League Return: party teleport$(br)- Eclipse Veil: stealth field

Scrolls are activated at circle cores, consuming a large amount of mana. Higher-tier circles amplify scroll effects.$(br2)Forbidden Scrolls (T5 only) have devastating power but inflict Mana Scar — a debuff lasting days that reduces your max mana and spell efficiency.
